basic_details.job_title: IIM Tiruchirappalli Research Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Tiruchirappalli (IIM Tiruchirappalli) Research Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Tiruchirappalli. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Tiruchirappalli Research Staff Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (first class) in commerce/economics/management/statistics/textile technology, PhD preferred
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (first class) in commerce/economics/management/statistics/textile technology or PhD preferred.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Tiruchirappalli to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Tiruchirappalli Research Staff Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Staff position at IIM Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Research Staff position at IIM Tiruchirappalli is 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Staff role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a postgraduate degree (first class) in commerce, economics, management, statistics, or textile technology. A PhD is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Staff position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Staff post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Staff position at IIM Tiruchirappalli.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Research Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Staff position?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on the applications received.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Tiruchirappalli located?
faq.answer: IIM Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online only through the official website of IIM Tiruchirappalli.
